2603.23911.title: Self-Distillation for Multi-Token Prediction
2603.23911.paper_summary: As Large Language Models (LLMs) scale up, inference efficiency becomes a critical bottleneck. Multi-Token Prediction (MTP) could accelerate LLM inference by predicting multiple future tokens in parallel. However, existing MTP approaches still face two challenges: limited acceptance rates of MTP heads, and difficulties in jointly training multiple MTP heads. Therefore, we propose MTP-D, a simple yet effective self-distillation method with minimal additional training cost, which boosts MTP head acceptance rates (+7.5\%) while maximumly preserving main-head performance. We also introduce a looped extension strategy for MTP-D, enabling effective and economical MTP head extension and further significant inference speedup to 1-head MTP (+220.4\%). Moreover, we systematically explore and validate key insights on the distillation strategies and the potential scalability of MTP through extensive experiments on seven benchmarks. These results demonstrate that our MTP-D and looped extension strategy effectively enhance MTP-head performance and inference efficiency, facilitating the practical usage of MTP in LLMs.
2603.23911.paper_summary_zh: 隨著大型語言模型（LLMs）的擴展，推理效率成為一個關鍵瓶頸。多標記預測（MTP）可以通過並行預測多個未來標記來加速LLM的推理。然而，現有的MTP方法仍面臨兩個挑戰：MTP頭的接受率有限，以及共同訓練多個MTP頭的困難。因此，我們提出了MTP-D，一種簡單而有效的自我蒸餾方法，具有最小的額外訓練成本，能夠提高MTP頭的接受率（+7.5\%），同時最大限度地保留主頭的性能。我們還介紹了一種循環擴展策略，用於MTP-D，實現有效且經濟的MTP頭擴展，並進一步顯著加速1頭MTP的推理速度（+220.4\%）。此外，我們通過在七個基準上進行廣泛實驗，系統地探索和驗證了蒸餾策略的關鍵見解及MTP的潛在可擴展性。這些結果表明，我們的MTP-D和循環擴展策略有效地提升了MTP頭的性能和推理效率，促進了MTP在LLMs中的實際應用。
2603.23911.author: Guoliang Zhao et.al.
2603.23911.authors: Guoliang Zhao, Ruobing Xie, An Wang, Shuaipeng Li, Huaibing Xie, Xingwu Sun
